mapper.select: SELECT BOT_ID, CATEGORY_NAME, QUESTION_KEYWORD, ANSWER_CONTENT, ACTIVE_YN, USER_ID FROM BOT ORDER BY BOT_ID DESC
SELECT BOT_ID, CATEGORY_NAME, QUESTION_KEYWORD, ANSWER_CONTENT, ACTIVE_YN, USER_ID FROM BOT WHERE ACTIVE_YN = 'Y' ORDER BY BOT_ID DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO BOT ( BOT_ID, CATEGORY_NAME, QUESTION_KEYWORD, ANSWER_CONTENT, USER_ID ) VALUES ( BOT_SEQ.NEXTVAL, #{categoryName}, #{questionKeyword}, #{answerContent}, #{userId} )
mapper.select: SELECT BOT_ID, CATEGORY_NAME, QUESTION_KEYWORD, ANSWER_CONTENT, ACTIVE_YN, USER_ID FROM BOT WHERE ACTIVE_YN = 'Y' AND QUESTION_KEYWORD IS NOT NULL AND QUESTION_KEYWORD LIKE '%' || #{value} || '%' ORDER BY BOT_ID DESC
SELECT bot_id AS botId, category_name AS categoryName, question_keyword AS questionKeyword, answer_content AS answerContent, active_yn AS activeYn, user_id AS userId FROM bot WHERE active_yn = 'Y'

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT s.store_id AS storeId, s.store_name AS storeName, s.store_addr AS storeAddr, s.store_picture AS storePicture, s.dibs_count AS dibsCount, s.rating AS rating FROM store s WHERE s.store_name LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' AND s.status = '승인' ORDER BY s.dibs_count DESC, s.rating DESC, s.store_id DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM <= 3

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT s.store_id AS storeId, s.store_name AS storeName, s.store_addr AS storeAddr, s.store_picture AS storePicture, s.dibs_count AS dibsCount, s.rating AS rating, m.menu_id AS menuId, m.menu_name AS menuName, m.menu_price AS menuPrice, m.menu_picture AS menuPicture FROM menu m JOIN store s ON s.store_id = m.store_id WHERE m.menu_name LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' AND s.status = '승인' ORDER BY s.dibs_count DESC, s.rating DESC, m.menu_price ASC ) WHERE ROWNUM <= 3

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT s.STORE_ID AS STOREID, s.STORE_NAME AS STORENAME, s.STORE_ADDR AS STOREADDR, s.STORE_PICTURE AS STOREPICTURE, s.CATEGORY AS CATEGORY, s.RATING AS RATING, s.LIKES_COUNT AS LIKESCOUNT FROM STORE s WHERE s.CATEGORY = #{categoryName} ORDER BY s.LIKES_COUNT DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM <= 3

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT DISTINCT s.STORE_ID AS STOREID, s.STORE_NAME AS STORENAME, s.STORE_ADDR AS STOREADDR, s.STORE_PICTURE AS STOREPICTURE, s.CATEGORY AS CATEGORY, s.RATING AS RATING, s.LIKES_COUNT AS LIKESCOUNT FROM STORE s JOIN MENU m ON m.STORE_ID = s.STORE_ID WHERE m.MENU_NAME LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' ORDER BY s.LIKES_COUNT DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM <= 3

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT m.menu_id AS menuId, m.menu_name AS menuName, m.menu_price AS menuPrice, m.menu_picture AS menuPicture,
s.store_id AS storeId, s.store_name AS storeName, s.store_addr AS storeAddr, s.category AS category, s.likes_count AS likesCount, s.store_picture AS storePicture FROM menu m JOIN store s ON m.store_id = s.store_id WHERE m.menu_name LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' ORDER BY s.likes_count DESC, s.rating DESC, s.review_count DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM <= 3

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT DISTINCT s.STORE_ID AS STOREID, s.STORE_NAME AS STORENAME, s.STORE_ADDR AS STOREADDR, s.STORE_PICTURE AS STOREPICTURE, s.CATEGORY AS CATEGORY, s.RATING AS RATING, s.LIKES_COUNT AS LIKESCOUNT FROM STORE s JOIN MENU m ON m.STORE_ID = s.STORE_ID WHERE m.MENU_NAME LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' ORDER BY s.LIKES_COUNT DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM <= 3
